title: Controlled / Uncontrolled dual-mode coherence
mechanism: DS-wide:rubric 三類全枚舉(form controls 18:Input/Textarea/Select/Combobox/Checkbox/CheckboxGroup/RadioGroup/Switch/Slider/DatePicker/TimePicker/NumberInput/LinkInput/PeoplePicker/SelectMenu/Rating/SegmentedControl/InlineEdit;overlay 9:Dialog/Sheet/Popover/DropdownMenu/Tooltip/HoverCard/FileViewer/Coachmark/Command;tab-like 3:Tabs/Accordion/TreeView)。逐檔 grep value/defaultValue/checked/defaultChecked/open/defaultOpen + callback pair + Radix Root forward + V4 internal-state mirror(Input/Textarea resolved mirror、InlineEdit draft useEffect sync 逐一驗);single-mode 者交叉查 spec「Controlled-only rationale(Dim 26)」段。本輪 InlineEdit 委派重構 regression 重點驗
verdict: 1 marginal after 全掃 30 components:dual-mode 完整(Checkbox/Switch/Slider/Select/Rating/SegmentedControl/TreeView/Coachmark/FileViewer + Radix pass-through 全過;Input/Textarea 2026-07-13/14 mirror 修已落);controlled-only 家族 7 元件(Combobox/DatePicker/TimePicker/NumberInput/LinkInput/PeoplePicker/SelectMenu)spec 全有 rationale 段;唯本輪重構的 InlineEdit 為 controlled-only(value 必傳 + onCommit,無 defaultValue)但 spec 無同名 rationale 段

findings.問題: InlineEdit 採 controlled-only(value: T 必傳 + onCommit;draft 內部管理,無 defaultValue uncontrolled fallback = rubric V1),但 inline-edit.spec.md 無「Controlled-only rationale(Dim 26)」段 — Field 家族其他 7 個 controlled-only 元件 spec 全有此段(慣例已建立)。邊界處:InlineEdit 是 mode 軸之上的編排層非 Field 控件本身,且 benchmark(Atlassian inline-edit 反而是 defaultValue+onConfirm uncontrolled)顯示此決策更需要 documented rationale
findings.建議: inline-edit.spec.md 補「Controlled-only rationale(Dim 26)」段:對齊 Field 家族同名段格式,說明 view↔edit 二態 + commit lifecycle 下 value 為 SSOT、draft 內部化的理由,並 cite Atlassian uncontrolled 對照(我方刻意不同)。純 spec 補述,不動 API
